calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 17, 2016, in Department 525:
James J. Steinle, Esq. Bar#237291,((415) 799-4965) Specially appearance for Respondent Elinor RB Engelking who is also present.
Barbara Marquez, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Counsel Steinle for Ms. Engelking requests for dismissal of appeal because the Appeal was filed one day after 30 days per CCP rule 116.750(b). Court acknowledges the request.

Respondent/Plaintiff, Engelking testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - 3/17/2016 Cellere, Kim, sublease10/13/2015 demand letter, gmail response letter, etc.

Appellant/Defendant, Barbara Marquez testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1)- sublease agreement, pictures, and rent board ruling. 6.15c

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Judgment Entered
